data.name: Integration Name
data.off_delay: Delay after motion stops (seconds, 0 = no delay)

data_description.name: Name that will be displayed in the integration
data_description.camera_entity: Select a camera from the list of available
data_description.save_path: Folder for saving recordings relative to /media. Variables are supported, e.g. camera_name
data_description.filename_template: Select date and time format for recording filenames. All formats include seconds to avoid file overwriting when multiple triggers occur in the same minute
data_description.max_duration: Maximum time of one recording (10-3600 seconds). If motion does not stop, recording will stop by timeout
data_description.prebuffer: How many seconds before motion detection to include in recording. Works only if stream is already active
data_description.motion_sensors: You can select multiple sensors. Recording will start when any of them triggers
data_description.motion_filter: Delay before starting recording. If motion stops earlier — recording will not start (false trigger protection)
data_description.off_delay: How many seconds to wait after motion stops before stopping recording. If motion returns — timer resets
data_description.retention_days: Automatically delete recordings older than specified days. 0 = never delete. Cleanup runs daily at 03:00
data_description.force_stop_sensor: Optional. Entity that will immediately stop recording when it reaches the specified state
data_description.force_stop_state: State value of the force stop sensor (usually 'off' or 'on')
data_description.log_level: Log detail level. DEBUG — for debugging, INFO — normal mode

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one configuration per camera is allowed
